system.description:
A knight's oath is a sacred bond,

uplifting all who would rally to their banner,

and rely on their shield.

LEVEL 3

Aura of Virtue. Gain an aura with a Reach of 4. Allies within your aura may use Condemning Strike and Blessed Aim on melee attacks if you spend Mana on their behalf.

Sworn to Courage. You and allies within your aura gain advantage on saves against Fear, Charm and Petrification.

LEVEL 7

Defend the Helpless. You can now Interpose from 3 spaces away. You may make a melee attack for free immediately after Interposing.

Speak only Truth. Gain WIL temporary Mana when you roll Initiative (expires at the end of the encounter if unused).

LEVEL 11

Uphold the Weak. When using Lay on Hands, you may choose another creature within your aura to be healed for the same amount.

LEVEL 15

Undo the Wicked. When you Interpose, the attacker become Frightened of you until the end of their next turn.
